title: astragalus maritimus
intro: Astragalus maritimus, also known as the "sea milk-vetch," is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the coastal areas of Europe and western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Astragalus maritimus include improving immune function, reducing stress, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Astragalus maritimus can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
